101.iwh_en: It was narrated from a Companion (may Allah be pleased with him) that when they mentioned a certain drink to the Prophet ﷺ twice and again before departing, he kept saying: "Do not feed it to them." And he said: "Whoever will not give it up, strike his neck."
101.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang sahabat (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ketika mereka menyebutkan minuman tertentu kepada Nabi ﷺ dua kali dan sekali lagi sebelum berangkat, beliau terus bersabda: "Jangan berikan itu kepada mereka." Dan beliau bersabda: "Barangsiapa tidak mau meninggalkannya, penggal lehernya."

102.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Habiba (may Allah be pleased with her) that she had been the wife of Ubayd Allah ibn Jahsh, who had traveled to the Negus and died there. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ then married Umm Habiba while she was in the land of Abyssinia. The Negus officiated the marriage on his behalf, and her dower was four thousand. He then prepared her and sent her to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ with Sharhabil ibn Hasana.
102.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Habibah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia pernah menjadi istri Ubaidullah bin Jahsy, yang telah pergi ke Najasyi dan meninggal di sana. Rasulullah ﷺ kemudian menikahi Umm Habibah sementara ia berada di tanah Habasyah. Najasyi menikahkannya atas nama beliau, dan maharnya empat ribu. Ia kemudian mempersiapkannya dan mengirimnya kepada Rasulullah ﷺ bersama Syurahbil bin Hasanah.

103.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Habiba (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "The angels do not accompany a caravan that has a bell with it."
103.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Habibah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Para malaikat tidak menemani kafilah yang memiliki lonceng bersamanya."

104.iwh_en: It was narrated from a Companion (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ mentioned what had befallen previous nations and asked Allah to grant him intercession for his community on the Day of Resurrection, and Allah did so.
104.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang sahabat (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ menyebutkan apa yang telah menimpa umat-umat terdahulu dan meminta kepada Allah untuk memberinya syafaat bagi umatnya pada Hari Kiamat, dan Allah pun mengabulkannya.

105.iwh_en: It was narrated from a wife of the Prophet ﷺ (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "Whoever prays twelve rak'ahs in a day beyond the obligatory prayers, Allah will build — or: a house will be built — for him in Paradise."
105.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari salah satu istri Nabi ﷺ (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Barangsiapa shalat dua belas rakaat dalam sehari selain shalat wajib, Allah akan membangun — atau: akan dibangunkan — untuknya sebuah rumah di surga."

106.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Habiba (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said to the Prophet ﷺ: "I have no one like you, and I would love for one who shares goodness with me to be my sister." The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "That is not permissible for me." She said: "By Allah, O Messenger of Allah, we have been told that you wish to marry Durra bint Abi Salama." The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "The daughter of Umm Salama?" She said: "Yes." The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "By Allah, even if she were not my stepdaughter under my care, she would still not be permissible for me, for she is my foster niece."
106.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Habibah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata kepada Nabi ﷺ: "Tidak ada yang sepertimu, dan aku ingin saudariku berbagi kebaikan bersamaku." Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Itu tidak diperbolehkan bagiku." Ia berkata: "Demi Allah, ya Rasulullah, kami telah diberitahu bahwa engkau ingin menikahi Durrah binti Abi Salamah." Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Putri Umm Salamah?" Ia berkata: "Ya." Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Demi Allah, meskipun ia bukan anak tiriku yang berada dalam asuhanku, ia tetap tidak halal bagiku, karena ia adalah keponakanku dari persusuan."

107.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zaynab bint Jahsh (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ woke from his sleep with his face flushed, saying: "There is no god but Allah. Woe to the Arabs from an evil that has drawn near. Today an opening has been made in the barrier of Gog and Magog like this" — and he made a circle with his fingers. She said: "I said: 'O Messenger of Allah, will we perish even though there are righteous people among us?' He ﷺ said: 'Yes, when wickedness becomes widespread.'"
107.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zainab binti Jahsy (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ terbangun dari tidurnya dengan wajah memerah, bersabda: "Tidak ada tuhan selain Allah. Celakalah orang Arab dari kejahatan yang telah dekat. Hari ini telah dibuka celah pada tembok Ya'juj dan Ma'juj seperti ini" — dan beliau membuat lingkaran dengan jari-jarinya. Ia berkata: "Aku berkata: 'Ya Rasulullah, apakah kami akan binasa meskipun ada orang-orang saleh di antara kami?' Beliau ﷺ bersabda: 'Ya, ketika kerusakan telah merajalela.'"

108.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zaynab bint Jahsh (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said: "Woe to the Arabs from an evil that has drawn near. Today an opening has been made in the barrier of Gog and Magog like this" — and he formed a circle with his thumb and the finger next to it. Zaynab bint Jahsh said: "I said: 'O Messenger of Allah, will we perish even though there are righteous people among us?' He said: 'Yes, when wickedness becomes widespread.'"
108.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zainab binti Jahsy (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: "Celakalah orang Arab dari kejahatan yang telah dekat. Hari ini telah dibuka celah pada tembok Ya'juj dan Ma'juj seperti ini" — dan beliau membuat lingkaran dengan ibu jari dan jari di sebelahnya. Zainab binti Jahsy berkata: "Aku berkata: 'Ya Rasulullah, apakah kami akan binasa meskipun ada orang-orang saleh di antara kami?' Beliau bersabda: 'Ya, ketika kerusakan telah merajalela.'"

109.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zaynab bint Jahsh (may Allah be pleased with her) via Umm Habiba, wife of the Prophet ﷺ, that she narrated to him from Zaynab bint Jahsh that she said: "I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: 'Were it not that I feared causing hardship to my community, I would have ordered them to use the toothstick before every prayer, just as they perform ablution.'"
109.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zainab binti Jahsy (radhiyallahu 'anha) melalui Umm Habibah, istri Nabi ﷺ, bahwa ia menceritakan kepadanya dari Zainab binti Jahsy bahwa ia berkata: "Aku mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Seandainya aku tidak khawatir memberatkan umatku, aku pasti memerintahkan mereka untuk menggunakan siwak sebelum setiap shalat, sebagaimana mereka berwudhu.'"

110.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zaynab bint Jahsh (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ indicated with his index finger and thumb and said: "Woe to the Arabs from an evil that has drawn near. Today an opening has been made in the barrier of Gog and Magog the size of a dirham." She said: "I said: 'O Messenger of Allah, will we perish even though there are righteous people among us?' He ﷺ said: 'Yes, when wickedness becomes widespread.'"
110.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zainab binti Jahsy (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ mengisyaratkan dengan jari telunjuk dan ibu jarinya dan bersabda: "Celakalah orang Arab dari kejahatan yang telah dekat. Hari ini telah dibuka celah pada tembok Ya'juj dan Ma'juj seukuran dirham." Ia berkata: "Aku berkata: 'Ya Rasulullah, apakah kami akan binasa meskipun ada orang-orang saleh di antara kami?' Beliau ﷺ bersabda: 'Ya, ketika kerusakan telah merajalela.'"

111.iwh_en: It was narrated from a woman of the Companions (may Allah be pleased with her) that a man came to the Prophet ﷺ and said: "O Messenger of Allah, my father is an old man who cannot perform Hajj." He said: "What do you think — if your father owed a debt and you paid it on his behalf, would it be accepted from you?" He said: "Yes." He ﷺ said: "Then Allah is more merciful. Perform Hajj on behalf of your father."
111.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang wanita sahabiyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa seorang laki-laki datang kepada Nabi ﷺ dan berkata: "Ya Rasulullah, ayahku adalah seorang tua yang tidak mampu berhaji." Beliau bersabda: "Bagaimana menurutmu — jika ayahmu memiliki hutang dan kamu melunasinya atas namanya, apakah itu diterima darimu?" Ia berkata: "Ya." Beliau ﷺ bersabda: "Maka Allah lebih Maha Penyayang. Berhajilah atas nama ayahmu."

112.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sawda, wife of the Prophet ﷺ (may Allah be pleased with her), that she said: "One of our sheep died, and we tanned its hide. We continued to use it for soaking until it wore out completely."
112.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Saudah, istri Nabi ﷺ (radhiyallahu 'anha), bahwa ia berkata: "Seekor domba kami mati, dan kami menyamak kulitnya. Kami terus menggunakannya untuk merendam hingga akhirnya rusak."

113.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sawda, wife of the Prophet ﷺ (may Allah be pleased with her), about a slave woman whose master, Zam'a, died and who had given birth to a child resembling a man they had suspected. The Prophet ﷺ said regarding her: "As for you, veil yourself from him, for he is not your brother. And the inheritance belongs to him."
113.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Saudah, istri Nabi ﷺ (radhiyallahu 'anha), tentang seorang wanita hamba sahaya yang tuannya Zam'ah meninggal dan ia melahirkan seorang anak yang menyerupai laki-laki yang mereka curigai. Nabi ﷺ bersabda mengenai anak tersebut: "Adapun kamu, berhijablah darinya, karena ia bukan saudaramu. Dan warisannya adalah untuknya."

114.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sawda, wife of the Prophet ﷺ (may Allah be pleased with her), that she said: "The Prophet ﷺ passed by one day and said: 'Is there any food?' I said: 'No, except a bone that was given to our servant girl from the charity.' He ﷺ said: 'Bring it, for it has reached its lawful place.'"
114.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Saudah, istri Nabi ﷺ (radhiyallahu 'anha), bahwa ia berkata: "Nabi ﷺ melewati suatu hari dan bersabda: 'Adakah makanan?' Aku berkata: 'Tidak, kecuali tulang yang diberikan kepada pelayan kami dari sedekah.' Beliau ﷺ bersabda: 'Bawalah, karena ia telah sampai ke tempatnya yang halal.'"

115.iwh_en: It was narrated from Juwayria (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ passed by her in the morning while she was in the mosque making supplication, then passed by her near midday and said: "You are still in the same state?" She said: "Yes." He ﷺ said: "Shall I not teach you words that are equivalent to all of that? 'Glory be to Allah, as many times as the number of His creation; Glory be to Allah, as many times as the number of His creation' — three times. 'Glory be to Allah according to His pleasure; Glory be to Allah according to His pleasure; Glory be to Allah according to His pleasure.' 'Glory be to Allah as heavy as His Throne; Glory be to Allah as heavy as His Throne.'"
115.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Juwairiyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ melewatinya di pagi hari sementara ia berada di masjid berdoa, kemudian melewatinya mendekati tengah hari dan bersabda: "Kamu masih dalam keadaan yang sama?" Ia berkata: "Ya." Beliau ﷺ bersabda: "Tidakkah aku ajarkan kepadamu kata-kata yang setara dengan semua itu? 'Subhanallah sebanyak jumlah ciptaan-Nya; Subhanallah sebanyak jumlah ciptaan-Nya' — tiga kali. 'Subhanallah sesuai dengan keridhaan-Nya; Subhanallah sesuai dengan keridhaan-Nya; Subhanallah sesuai dengan keridhaan-Nya.' 'Subhanallah seberat Arsy-Nya; Subhanallah seberat Arsy-Nya.'"

116.iwh_en: It was narrated from Juwayria (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ entered upon her on a Friday while she was fasting and said: "Did you fast yesterday?" She said: "No." He said: "Do you intend to fast tomorrow?" She said: "No." He ﷺ said: "Then break your fast."
116.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Juwairiyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ masuk menemuinya pada hari Jumat sementara ia sedang berpuasa dan bersabda: "Apakah kamu berpuasa kemarin?" Ia berkata: "Tidak." Beliau bersabda: "Apakah kamu berniat puasa besok?" Ia berkata: "Tidak." Beliau ﷺ bersabda: "Maka berbukalah."

117.iwh_en: It was narrated from Juwayria (may Allah be pleased with her) from the Prophet ﷺ that he said: "Whoever wears a silk garment in this world, Allah the Almighty will clothe him with a garment of humiliation — or a garment of fire."
117.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Juwairiyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) dari Nabi ﷺ bahwa beliau bersabda: "Barangsiapa memakai pakaian sutra di dunia ini, Allah Ta'ala akan memakaikan kepadanya pakaian kehinaan — atau pakaian dari api."

118.iwh_en: It was narrated from Juwayria (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ entered upon her and said: "Is there any food?" She said: "No, by Allah, we have no food except a bone from a sheep that was given to our servant girl from the charity." He ﷺ said: "Bring it, for it has reached its lawful place."
118.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Juwairiyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ masuk menemuinya dan bersabda: "Adakah makanan?" Ia berkata: "Tidak, demi Allah, kami tidak memiliki makanan kecuali tulang dari domba yang diberikan kepada pelayan kami dari sedekah." Beliau ﷺ bersabda: "Bawalah, karena ia telah sampai ke tempatnya yang halal."

119.iwh_en: It was narrated from Juwayria (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ entered upon her on a Friday while she was fasting and said: "Did you fast yesterday?" She said: "No." He said: "Do you intend to fast tomorrow?" She said: "No." He said: "Then break your fast."
119.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Juwairiyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ masuk menemuinya pada hari Jumat sementara ia sedang berpuasa dan bersabda: "Apakah kamu berpuasa kemarin?" Ia berkata: "Tidak." Beliau bersabda: "Apakah kamu berniat puasa besok?" Ia berkata: "Tidak." Beliau bersabda: "Maka berbukalah."

120.iwh_en: It was narrated from Anas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "O Allah, increase his wealth and his children, and bless him in what You have given him." Anas said: "Some of my children have informed me that we have buried from my children and grandchildren more than one hundred."
120.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Anas (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Ya Allah, perbanyaklah hartanya dan anak-anaknya, dan berkahilah dia dalam apa yang telah Engkau berikan kepadanya." Anas berkata: "Sebagian anakku memberitahuku bahwa kami telah menguburkan dari anak-anak dan cucu-cucuku lebih dari seratus orang."

121.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Sulaym (may Allah be pleased with her) that Ibn Abbas said a menstruating woman may depart if she wishes without waiting. When the Ansar said they would not follow him in contradicting Zayd, Ibn Abbas said: "Ask your companion Umm Sulaym." They asked her, and she informed them that Safiyya bint Huyay had experienced that, and the Prophet ﷺ ordered Safiyya to depart. She also informed them that she herself had experienced it, and the Messenger of Allah ﷺ ordered her to depart as well.
121.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Sulaym (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Ibnu Abbas berkata seorang wanita yang sedang haid boleh berangkat jika ia mau tanpa menunggu. Ketika orang-orang Anshar berkata bahwa mereka tidak akan mengikutinya dalam menentang Zaid, Ibnu Abbas berkata: "Tanyakan kepada rekan kalian Umm Sulaym." Mereka bertanya kepadanya, dan ia memberitahu mereka bahwa Shafiyyah binti Huyay mengalami hal itu, dan Nabi ﷺ memerintahkan Shafiyyah untuk berangkat. Ia juga memberitahu mereka bahwa ia sendiri pernah mengalaminya, dan Rasulullah ﷺ juga memerintahkannya untuk berangkat.

122.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Sulaym (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ entered their home and there was a water skin hanging. He drank from the mouth of the water skin while standing. Umm Sulaym then went to the mouth of the water skin and cut it off.
122.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Sulaym (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ masuk ke rumah mereka dan ada kantung air yang tergantung. Beliau minum dari mulut kantung air itu dalam keadaan berdiri. Umm Sulaym kemudian pergi ke mulut kantung air itu dan memotongnya.

123.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Sulaym (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said: "There is no Muslim couple who lose three children before they reach the age of accountability except that Allah will admit both of them into Paradise by His abundant mercy." He said it three times. It was said: "O Messenger of Allah, and two?" He said: "And two."
123.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Sulaym (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: "Tidak ada pasangan Muslim yang kehilangan tiga anak sebelum mereka mencapai usia taklif kecuali Allah akan memasukkan keduanya ke surga dengan rahmat-Nya yang melimpah." Beliau mengatakannya tiga kali. Ditanya: "Ya Rasulullah, bagaimana dengan dua?" Beliau bersabda: "Dan dua."

124.iwh_en: It was narrated from the mother of Anas (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ entered and there was a water skin hanging in the house. He drank from it while standing. She then cut off its mouth, and it is still with her.
124.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari ibu Anas (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ masuk dan ada kantung air yang tergantung di rumah. Beliau minum darinya dalam keadaan berdiri. Ia kemudian memotong mulutnya, dan masih ada di sisinya.

125.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Sulaym (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "I menstruated after performing the tawaf of the House on the day of sacrifice, and the Messenger of Allah ﷺ ordered me to depart." Safiyya also menstruated, and Aisha said to her: "May you be deprived — you are detaining us." This was mentioned to the Prophet ﷺ and he said: "Tell her to depart."
125.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Sulaym (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Aku haid setelah melakukan tawaf di Ka'bah pada hari penyembelihan, dan Rasulullah ﷺ memerintahkanku untuk berangkat." Shafiyyah juga haid, dan Aisyah berkata kepadanya: "Semoga engkau tidak beruntung — kamu menahan kami." Hal ini disebutkan kepada Nabi ﷺ dan beliau bersabda: "Katakan kepadanya untuk berangkat."

126.iwh_en: It was narrated from a female Companion (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ raised his gaze or eyes toward her and said: "You are from me, and I am from you." A man was then brought and said: "I did not do it — I was only told to do so." She said: "He had asked on the pulpit: 'Who are the best of people?' He said: 'The most learned of them in the religion of Allah, the one who keeps the most ties of kinship.'" Sharik mentioned two more things that I did not retain.
126.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang wanita sahabiyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ mengangkat pandangan atau matanya ke arahnya dan bersabda: "Kamu dariku, dan aku darimu." Seorang laki-laki kemudian dibawa dan berkata: "Aku tidak melakukannya — aku hanya diperintahkan untuk melakukannya." Ia berkata: "Beliau pernah bertanya di atas mimbar: 'Siapakah sebaik-baik manusia?' Beliau bersabda: 'Yang paling paham tentang agama Allah, yang paling banyak menyambung silaturahmi.'" Syarik menyebutkan dua hal lain yang tidak aku ingat.

127.iwh_en: It was narrated from a female Companion (may Allah be pleased with her) that a man came to the Prophet ﷺ while he was on the pulpit and said: "O Messenger of Allah, who are the best of people?" He ﷺ said: "The best of people are those who recite the most Quran, are the most God-fearing, command the most good, forbid the most evil, and maintain the most ties of kinship."
127.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang wanita sahabiyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa seorang laki-laki datang kepada Nabi ﷺ sementara beliau berada di atas mimbar dan berkata: "Ya Rasulullah, siapakah sebaik-baik manusia?" Beliau ﷺ bersabda: "Sebaik-baik manusia adalah yang paling banyak membaca Al-Quran, paling bertakwa, paling banyak memerintahkan kebaikan, paling banyak mencegah kemungkaran, dan paling banyak menyambung silaturahmi."

128.iwh_en: It was narrated from Subay'a bint al-Harith (may Allah be pleased with her) that she was the wife of Sa'd ibn Khawla. He died during the Farewell Pilgrimage, and she gave birth shortly after his death. When she presented herself for marriage, the Messenger of Allah ﷺ told her that her waiting period had ended and she was free to marry.
128.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Subai'ah binti al-Harits (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia adalah istri Sa'd bin Khawlah. Ia meninggal pada Haji Wada', dan ia melahirkan tak lama setelah kematiannya. Ketika ia menawarkan dirinya untuk menikah, Rasulullah ﷺ memberitahunya bahwa masa iddahnya telah selesai dan ia bebas untuk menikah.

129.iwh_en: It was narrated from Subay'a bint al-Harith (may Allah be pleased with her) that she had adorned herself and was ready for marriage when her father-in-law entered and said: "What do you want, O Subay'a?" She said: "I want to get married." He said: "By Allah, you have no right to a husband until you have completed four months and ten days." She then went to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and mentioned this to him. He ﷺ said to her: "You are free — marry."
129.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Subai'ah binti al-Harits (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia telah berhias dan siap untuk menikah ketika mertuanya masuk dan berkata: "Apa yang kamu inginkan, wahai Subai'ah?" Ia berkata: "Aku ingin menikah." Ia berkata: "Demi Allah, kamu tidak berhak menikah sampai kamu menyelesaikan empat bulan sepuluh hari." Ia kemudian pergi kepada Rasulullah ﷺ dan menyebutkan hal ini kepadanya. Beliau ﷺ bersabda kepadanya: "Kamu bebas — menikahlah."

130.iwh_en: It was narrated from a woman who had performed Hajj with the Prophet ﷺ (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to say: 'Ibn Umm Maktum calls the adhan at night, so eat and drink until Bilal calls the adhan' — or: 'Bilal calls the adhan at night, so eat and drink until Ibn Umm Maktum calls.' One of them would go up and the other would come down, and we would grab him and say: 'Stay still until we finish our suhur.'"
130.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang wanita yang pernah berhaji bersama Nabi ﷺ (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ biasa bersabda: 'Ibnu Umm Maktum mengumandangkan adzan di malam hari, maka makan dan minumlah sampai Bilal mengumandangkan adzan' — atau: 'Bilal mengumandangkan adzan di malam hari, maka makan dan minumlah sampai Ibnu Umm Maktum mengumandangkan adzan.' Salah satu dari mereka akan naik dan yang lain akan turun, dan kami akan menggamit tangannya dan berkata: 'Tetaplah di situ sampai kami selesai sahur.'"

131.iwh_en: It was narrated from a female Companion (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "When Ibn Umm Maktum gives the adhan, eat and drink. When Bilal gives the adhan, do not eat or drink." She said: "A woman might still have some of her suhur left, and we would say to Bilal: 'Wait until I finish my suhur.'"
131.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang wanita sahabiyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Ketika Ibnu Umm Maktum mengumandangkan adzan, makan dan minumlah. Ketika Bilal mengumandangkan adzan, jangan makan atau minum." Ia berkata: "Seorang wanita mungkin masih memiliki sisa sahurnya, dan kami berkata kepada Bilal: 'Tunggu sampai aku selesai sahur.'"

132.iwh_en: It was narrated from a woman of the Companions (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said: "Ibn Umm Maktum — or Bilal — calls the adhan at night, so eat and drink until Bilal — or Ibn Umm Maktum — calls." As soon as one of them gave the adhan and the other went up, we would take him by the hand and say: 'Stay still until we finish our suhur.'"
132.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang wanita sahabiyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: "Ibnu Umm Maktum — atau Bilal — mengumandangkan adzan di malam hari, maka makan dan minumlah sampai Bilal — atau Ibnu Umm Maktum — mengumandangkan adzan." Begitu salah satu dari mereka mengumandangkan adzan dan yang lain naik, kami mengambil tangannya dan berkata: 'Tetaplah di situ sampai kami selesai sahur.'

133.iwh_en: It was narrated from a female Companion (may Allah be pleased with her) that she narrated to him from the Messenger of Allah ﷺ that people prepared food that contained some of these vegetables. It was brought to him and he disliked it. He said to his Companions: "Eat, for I am not like one of you — I fear that I may offend my companion," meaning the angel.
133.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang wanita sahabiyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia menceritakan kepadanya dari Rasulullah ﷺ bahwa orang-orang mempersiapkan makanan yang mengandung beberapa sayuran ini. Makanan itu dibawa kepadanya dan beliau tidak menyukainya. Beliau bersabda kepada para sahabatnya: "Makanlah, karena aku tidak seperti salah seorang dari kalian — aku khawatir dapat mengganggu sahabatku," maksudnya malaikat.

134.iwh_en: It was narrated from a female Companion (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'The Quran was revealed in seven dialects. Whichever you recite is sufficient.'"
134.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang wanita sahabiyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Al-Quran diturunkan dalam tujuh dialek. Mana pun yang kamu baca adalah cukup.'"

135.iwh_en: It was narrated from Habiba (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "O Messenger of Allah, everything that my husband gave me is with me." The Prophet ﷺ said to Thabit: "Take it from her." So he took it from her, and she went and stayed with her family.
135.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Habibah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Ya Rasulullah, segala yang diberikan suamiku kepadaku ada padaku." Nabi ﷺ berkata kepada Tsabit: "Ambillah darinya." Maka ia mengambilnya darinya, dan ia pergi dan tinggal bersama keluarganya.

136.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Habiba bint Jahsh (may Allah be pleased with her) that she suffered from istihadah and asked the Messenger of Allah ﷺ about it. He ordered her to perform ghusl before every prayer. She would take out the basin and the redness of the blood could be seen rising above the water, yet she would pray.
136.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Habibah binti Jahsy (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia menderita istihadah dan bertanya kepada Rasulullah ﷺ tentangnya. Beliau memerintahkannya untuk mandi sebelum setiap shalat. Ia mengeluarkan baskom dan warna merah darah bisa terlihat mengapung di atas air, namun ia tetap shalat.

137.iwh_en: It was narrated from a woman of the Companions (may Allah be pleased with her) that she experienced continuous bleeding for seven years and complained about it to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ. The Prophet ﷺ said: "This is not menstruation — it is a vein. Perform ghusl." So she began performing ghusl before every prayer, and she would do so in the basin where the yellowish color of the blood could be seen.
137.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang wanita sahabiyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia mengalami pendarahan terus-menerus selama tujuh tahun dan mengadukan hal itu kepada Rasulullah ﷺ. Nabi ﷺ bersabda: "Ini bukan haid — ini adalah pembuluh darah. Mandilah." Maka ia mulai mandi sebelum setiap shalat, dan ia melakukannya di baskom di mana warna kekuningan darah bisa terlihat.

138.iwh_en: It was narrated from a wife of the Prophet ﷺ (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said: "I considered forbidding the practice of nursing while pregnant, but I looked at the Persians and Romans — they nurse their children while pregnant and it does not harm the children at all." He was then asked about coitus interruptus and the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "That is the hidden burial alive, and it is: 'And when the infant buried alive is asked.'"
138.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari salah satu istri Nabi ﷺ (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: "Aku mempertimbangkan untuk melarang praktik menyusui saat hamil, tetapi aku melihat kepada orang-orang Persia dan Romawi — mereka menyusui anak-anak mereka saat hamil dan itu tidak membahayakan anak-anak sama sekali." Beliau kemudian ditanya tentang azl dan Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Itu adalah penguburan hidup-hidup yang tersembunyi, dan itulah maksud: 'Dan ketika bayi perempuan yang dikubur hidup-hidup ditanya.'"

139.iwh_en: It was narrated from Kabisha, the grandmother of Abd al-Rahman ibn Abi Amra, that the Prophet ﷺ entered upon her and there was a water skin nearby. He drank from its mouth while standing.
139.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Kabisyah, nenek Abdurrahman bin Abi Amrah, bahwa Nabi ﷺ masuk menemuinya dan ada kantung air di dekatnya. Beliau minum dari mulutnya dalam keadaan berdiri.

140.iwh_en: It was narrated from the grandmother of Amr ibn Mu'adh al-Ashali (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'O believing women, let none of you look down upon a gift given to her neighbor, even if it is a burnt sheep's hoof.'"
140.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari nenek Amr bin Mu'adz al-Asyhali (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Wahai wanita-wanita beriman, janganlah salah seorang dari kalian meremehkan hadiah yang diberikan kepada tetangganya, meskipun hanya kuku kaki domba yang terbakar.'"

141.iwh_en: It was narrated from the grandmother of a Companion (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "Send back the beggar even if it is with a burnt hoof."
141.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari nenek seorang sahabat (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Kembalikanlah pengemis meskipun hanya dengan kuku yang terbakar."

142.iwh_en: It was narrated from a female Companion (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "Feed him dates." They said: "We do not have any." She said: "Then give him gruel." They said: "It is strange of you — can we give him what we do not have?" She said: "Indeed, I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: 'Do not turn away the beggar even if it is with a burnt hoof.'"
142.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang wanita sahabiyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Beri dia kurma." Mereka berkata: "Kami tidak punya." Ia berkata: "Kalau begitu beri dia tepung encer." Mereka berkata: "Aneh sekali kamu — apakah kami bisa memberinya apa yang tidak kami miliki?" Ia berkata: "Sesungguhnya aku mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Jangan tolak pengemis meskipun hanya dengan kuku yang terbakar.'"

143.iwh_en: It was narrated from a female Companion (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "We have a foul-smelling path to the mosque — what should we do when it rains?" He said: "Is there not another path after it that is cleaner?" She said: "Yes." He said: "Then this one compensates for that one."
143.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang wanita sahabiyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Kami memiliki jalan menuju masjid yang berbau busuk — apa yang harus kami lakukan ketika hujan?" Beliau bersabda: "Bukankah setelahnya ada jalan lain yang lebih bersih?" Ia berkata: "Ya." Beliau bersabda: "Maka yang ini mengimbangi yang itu."

144.iwh_en: It was narrated from a female Companion (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "I pass through a path that is not pleasant." He said: "Is there not a cleaner path after it?" She said: "Yes." He said: "This one removes the effect of that one."
144.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang wanita sahabiyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Aku melewati jalan yang tidak menyenangkan." Beliau bersabda: "Bukankah ada jalan yang lebih bersih setelahnya?" Ia berkata: "Ya." Beliau bersabda: "Yang ini menghilangkan efek dari yang itu."

145.iwh_en: It was narrated from a female Companion (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ laughed and she said: "Are you laughing at me, O Messenger of Allah?" He said: "No, but at a group of my community who will go on a naval expedition, returning with few spoils but forgiven." She said: "Pray to Allah to make me among them." He prayed for her. Ata ibn Yasar said: "I saw her in a military expedition led by al-Mundhir ibn al-Zubayr to the land of Byzantium — she was with us and died in the Byzantine lands."
145.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang wanita sahabiyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ tertawa dan ia berkata: "Apakah engkau menertawakanku, ya Rasulullah?" Beliau bersabda: "Tidak, tetapi aku menertawakan sekelompok umatku yang akan pergi berperang di laut, kembali dengan sedikit rampasan namun diampuni." Ia berkata: "Doakan Allah agar menjadikan aku di antara mereka." Beliau mendoakannya. Atha bin Yasar berkata: "Aku melihatnya dalam sebuah ekspedisi militer yang dipimpin al-Mundzir bin al-Zubayr ke tanah Byzantium — ia bersama kami dan meninggal di tanah Byzantium."

146.iwh_en: It was narrated from a woman of the Ansar (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "Our bread oven and the bread oven of the Prophet ﷺ were one. I memorized the surah Qaf only from him — he used to recite it."
146.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang wanita Anshar (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Tungku kami dan tungku Nabi ﷺ adalah satu. Aku menghafal surah Qaf hanya darinya — beliau biasa membacanya."

147.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Hisham bint Haritha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "Our bread oven and the oven of the Prophet ﷺ were one for two years, or a year and part of a year. I did not learn Surah Qaf and the Majestic Quran except from the tongue of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ — he used to recite it every Friday on the pulpit when he addressed the people."
147.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Hisyam binti Haritsah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Tungku kami dan tungku Nabi ﷺ adalah satu selama dua tahun, atau setahun dan sebagian tahun. Aku tidak mempelajari Surah Qaf dan Al-Quran yang Mulia kecuali dari lisan Rasulullah ﷺ — beliau biasa membacanya setiap Jumat di atas mimbar ketika beliau berkhutbah kepada orang-orang."

148.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm al-Ala al-Ansariyya (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said regarding Uthman ibn Maz'un: "I hope good for him, yet by Allah, I do not know — and I am the Messenger of Allah — what will be done with me." She said: "By Allah, I will never praise anyone after him." This saddened her, and she saw in a dream a flowing spring for Uthman. She told the Messenger of Allah ﷺ of this, and he said: "That is his deeds."
148.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm al-Ala al-Anshariyyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata mengenai Utsman bin Maz'un: "Aku mengharap kebaikan baginya, namun demi Allah, aku tidak tahu — dan aku adalah Rasulullah — apa yang akan terjadi denganku." Ia berkata: "Demi Allah, aku tidak akan pernah memuji siapapun setelahnya." Hal ini membuatnya sedih, dan ia bermimpi melihat mata air yang mengalir untuk Utsman. Ia memberitahu Rasulullah ﷺ tentang ini, dan beliau bersabda: "Itu adalah amalannya."

149.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm al-Ala al-Ansariyya (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet of Allah ﷺ heard her and said: "Who is this?" She said: "It is I." He ﷺ said: "And how do you know?" She said: "O Messenger of Allah, Uthman ibn Maz'un." The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "As for Uthman ibn Maz'un, we have seen nothing but good from him. And I am the Messenger of Allah, yet by Allah, I do not know what will be done with me."
149.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm al-Ala al-Anshariyyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi Allah ﷺ mendengarnya dan berkata: "Siapa ini?" Ia berkata: "Ini aku." Beliau ﷺ bersabda: "Dari mana kamu tahu?" Ia berkata: "Ya Rasulullah, Utsman bin Maz'un." Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Adapun Utsman bin Maz'un, kami tidak melihat dari dirinya kecuali kebaikan. Dan aku adalah Rasulullah, namun demi Allah, aku tidak tahu apa yang akan terjadi denganku."

150.iwh_en: It was narrated from the mother of Abd al-Rahman ibn Tariq ibn Alqama (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ, whenever he entered a room in the house of Ya'la — as identified by Ubayd Allah — would face the Ka'ba and supplicate.
150.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari ibu Abdurrahman bin Tariq bin Alqamah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ, setiap kali memasuki sebuah ruangan di rumah Ya'la — sebagaimana diidentifikasi oleh Ubaidullah — akan menghadap Ka'bah dan berdoa.
